raw_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><rss version="2.0"><channel><title>Status Feed Example</title><link>https://status.native-status-feed.co.uk</link><item><title>Major payment gateway outage</title><description>We are investigating checkout errors for merchant payments.</description><pubDate>Mon, 10 Feb 2099 09:00:00 GMT</pubDate></item><item><title>Card authorization latency</title><description>Identified issue affecting hosted checkout flow.</description><pubDate>Mon, 10 Feb 2099 09:25:00 GMT</pubDate></item><item><title>Incident resolved</title><description>Payment and checkout services restored.</description><pubDate>Mon, 10 Feb 2099 10:15:00 GMT</pubDate></item></channel></rss>
